response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of strong C++ development experience specifically on the Windows platform, which is critical for this role. While they have C/C++ experience, it is primarily with LabWindows/CVI (a C IDE) and not in a capital markets or fixed-income context. Their domain expertise is also misaligned, with no direct experience in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets systems.
strengths: Strong multi-language versatility (C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.)
Demonstrated ability to work in full-stack roles across diverse tech stacks
Proven track record in open-source contributions and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets
Lacks SQL Server/Oracle proficiency, which is a mandatory technical skill
